svg.title: Math and control foundation
svg.desc: Readable mathematical foundation for PPO actor critic control in continuous action spaces.
svg.text: L_clip(theta) = E_t[ min( r_t(theta) A_t, clip(r_t(theta), 1-epsilon, 1+epsilon) A_t ) ]
Actor-critic decomposition: policy head controls action distribution, value head stabilizes return targets.
GAE(lambda): lower-variance advantages for smoother policy updates in continuous control regimes.
Entropy term + clipping constraints: exploration support while bounding destabilizing policy shifts.
Control objective alignment: maximize mission-relevant reward under stable stochastic policy improvement.
